name: YouTube Trailers
description: Resolves YouTube trailers server-side with yt-dlp and stream-copy remuxes them to AVPlayer-native fMP4 HLS, so tvOS / AVKit clients (Apple TV) play one clean URL with zero on-device extraction — for both in-app trailers and the Top Shelf. Includes a dashboard config page and a daily prune task that bounds the cache by age and LRU size.
overview: Server-side YouTube trailers as AVPlayer-native HLS for tvOS clients.
